mapper.sql: t.id, t.registration_id, t.order_id, t.registration_status, t.plate_no, t.apply_time, t.material_submit_time, t.finish_time, t.fail_reason, t.external_apply_no, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.modify_time, t.modify_by, t.row_version, t.row_valid
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_registration t WHERE t.order_id = #{orderId} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_registration t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM vso_registration t WHERE t.row_valid = 1
AND t.order_id = #{params.orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vso_registration ( registration_id, order_id, registration_status, plate_no, apply_time, material_submit_time, finish_time, fail_reason, external_apply_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES ( #{registrationId}, #{orderId}, #{registrationStatus}, #{plateNo}, #{applyTime}, #{materialSubmitTime}, #{finishTime}, #{failReason}, #{externalApplyNo}, now(), #{createBy}, now(), #{modifyBy}, 1, 1 )

INSERT INTO vso_registration ( registration_id, order_id, registration_status, plate_no, apply_time, material_submit_time, finish_time, fail_reason, external_apply_no, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid ) VALUES
( #{item.registrationId}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.registrationStatus}, #{item.plateNo}, #{item.applyTime}, #{item.materialSubmitTime}, #{item.finishTime}, #{item.failReason}, #{item.externalApplyNo}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.modifyBy}, 1, 1 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_registration t SET
t.registration_status = #{registrationStatus},
t.plate_no = #{plateNo},
t.finish_time = #{finishTime},
t.fail_reason = #{failReason},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
UPDATE vso_registration t SET t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now(), t.row_valid = 0 WHERE t.id = #{value}
